title: acalypha intermedia
intro: Acalypha intermedia, also known as the intermediate cup plant, is a shrub-like plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, characterized by its distinctive cup-shaped inflorescences and greenish-yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Acalypha intermedia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit wound-healing properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and inflorescences are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to provide relief from various health conditions.
